summary: E1.1 + B1.2 server-side PDF + N12 'Email me this PDF' verified end-to-end. 14/14 pytest backend tests pass. Frontend dialog (download mode + email mode) verified in browser against /buildings/bld_001 and /buildings/bld_001/potential. Deep validation done via pdfminer text-extraction confirms persona-specific section gating works correctly.

issues: Missing Description / aria-describedby on DialogContent (a11y warning, not blocking)

action_items: (Optional) Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby on ReportDownloadDialog to silence Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: build_report_context correctly gates `subsidies` array on the section flag; verified provider PDF has no 'Subsidies & financing' heading and no PMSGMBY entries (only 'MNRE' appears once inside methodology — acceptable).
Section filter shrinks PDF: full citizen_owner = 55KB, sections=summary,solar,rainwater = ~31KB; biogas/plantation/methodology absent in filtered text — exactly as spec.
Biogas override `families=120 & waste=0.8` produced '96' in PDF text (96 kg/day waste figure) — override path wired correctly via _build_pdf_for_building.
Email-me flow inserts into pdf_uploads + pdf_email_requests, returns download_url, auto-joins beta_waitlist (persona='pdf-request') with idempotency guard.
PDF email handler stores binary inline in MongoDB doc — fine for <1MB but track growth; GridFS recommended if volume scales >5K requests/day.
test_credentials: Admin: gp@sus10.ai via Bearer iter10_fe_session (valid through May 19, 2026)
seed_data_creation: Created two pdf_email_requests + beta_waitlist entries (TEST_pdf_iter14@example.com, TEST_wl_<uuid>@example.com, TEST_iter14_uife@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 personas + section filtering + biogas override + email-me-pdf flow are stable. PDF text is extractable with pdfminer.six (installed). Building bld_001 is the canonical happy-path test target. Sizes observed: citizen_owner=55KB, rwa=60KB, provider=57KB, corporate_esg=60KB, rwa+families120=60KB, filtered=~31KB.

persona_section_text_check.citizen_owner: Subsidies & financing heading present, PMSGMBY present
persona_section_text_check.provider: Subsidies heading ABSENT, PMSGMBY ABSENT (only MNRE in methodology line) — matches spec

deep_validation_results.section_filter: sections=summary,solar,rainwater → biogas=False, plantation=False, methodology=False; rainwater=True, solar=True — correct
deep_validation_results.biogas_override: families=120 & waste=0.8 → '96' present in PDF text (96 kg/day) — correct
deep_validation_results.frontend_email_flow: Returned href https://.../api/pdf-reports/pdf_xxxx, GET returns application/pdf, 55312 bytes.

mocked_apis_acknowledged: Resend / actual email delivery is intentionally deferred — endpoint stores PDF and returns download_url; UI states 'we'll also email it to <addr> shortly'. Documented in problem statement.
